name: OpenAIConnector
description: OpenAI connector covering Chat Completions (GPT-4o family), Embeddings, Files, Images (DALL·E + gpt-image), Speech (TTS), Audio (Whisper), Moderations, and Models. Single API-key auth, Bearer in Authorization, optional OpenAI-Organization scoping.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: OpenAI API key from https://platform.openai.com/api-keys. Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <key>'.

install_fields.label: Base URL
install_fields.help: Override for Azure-compatible proxies or self-hosted OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

install_fields.label: Organization ID
install_fields.help: Optional OpenAI organization id. Sent as 'OpenAI-Organization' header when set.

install_fields.label: Webhook Signing Secret
install_fields.help: HMAC-SHA256 secret used to verify OpenAI webhook (Realtime / Assistants / batch) callback signatures.

apis.name: Install
apis.description: Validate required config keys and persist them via save_config. Does NOT call the API.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: API-key wrapper that returns a TokenInfo whose access_token is the configured api_key.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Probe GET /v1/models?limit=1 to verify the key and reachability. Maps 401/403/429 via _STATUS_MAP.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: List /v1/files and ingest each as a NormalizedDocument (tenant-scoped id). LLM provider — no document corpus; returns SUCCESS+0 if no files.

apis.name: List Models
apis.description: GET /v1/models — list every model the API key has access to.

apis.name: Get Model
apis.description: GET /v1/models/{model_id} — fetch metadata for a single model.

apis.name: Create Chat Completion
apis.description: POST /v1/chat/completions — run a chat completion. Returns the normalised response (flat content/usage/finish_reason + raw envelope).

apis.name: Create Embedding
apis.description: POST /v1/embeddings — embed input text into a vector.

apis.name: List Files
apis.description: GET /v1/files — list uploaded files (optionally filter by purpose).

apis.name: Upload File
apis.description: POST /v1/files — multipart upload. Purpose must be one of assistants|batch|fine-tune|vision|user_data.

apis.name: Create Image
apis.description: POST /v1/images/generations — generate one or more images (DALL·E 2/3, gpt-image-1).

apis.name: Create Speech
apis.description: POST /v1/audio/speech — synthesise speech, returns raw audio bytes (mp3/opus/aac/flac/wav/pcm).

apis.name: Create Transcription
apis.description: POST /v1/audio/transcriptions — multipart audio → text via Whisper.

apis.name: Create Moderation
apis.description: POST /v1/moderations — classify text for policy violations.

apis.name: Handle Webhook
apis.description: Route an OpenAI webhook (Realtime / Assistants / batch) through process_callback then per-event handler.

apis.name: Process Callback
apis.description: Verify OpenAI-Signature header using HMAC-SHA256 with webhook_secret. Returns {verified, data, error?}.

apis.name: Batch Processor
apis.description: Iterate events through handle_event with per-item error capture.
